title: mespilus tanacetifolia var. heldreichii
intro: Mespilus tanacetifolia var. heldreichii, also known as the Tanacetum heldreichii, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Mespilus tanacetifolia var. heldreichii include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, such as bloating and cramps, as well as its potential to reduce fever and relieve respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, from colds and coughs to menstrual cramps and skin irritations.
